message:
feat(web): compression middleware API cleanup, security hardening, and session improvements

Compression middleware migrates from raw header map access to typed
req.header()/resp.set_header() API, eliminating string key duplication
and making content-encoding handling consistent across the stack.

Security module gains stricter CSP directive validation and
nonce-per-request generation with configurable entropy source.
Session middleware adds sliding expiration with configurable
max-lifetime and idle-timeout independently.

Web response expands builder API with additional typed header setters
and streaming body support.

Benchmarks:
- Load balancer benchmark: new scenarios for ranked prefix selection
  comparing select_nth_unstable vs full sort at varying endpoint counts
- Protocol benchmark: additional throughput scenarios for codec changes

Infrastructure:
- RaptorQ wavefront pipeline artifact: parameter realignment
- Beads issue tracker state synced

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
